summary.productName: 任務 Spec：金流前置模擬平台（非真的刷卡）
goals: Simulate create-order to payment to callback and webhook flows without connecting to real payment providers.
Validate order state machine behavior, immutable transition history, and terminal-state protections.
Support QA coverage for success, failure, cancellation, timeout, delayed success, replay, and webhook resend scenarios.

narrative.summary: Entry contains the login page.
narrative.taskDescription: Model the login page as a direct child of the system entry diagram.

narrative.summary: Entry contains the orders page.
narrative.taskDescription: Model the orders page as a direct child of the system entry diagram.

narrative.summary: Entry contains the create-order page.
narrative.taskDescription: Model the create-order page as a direct child of the system entry diagram.

narrative.summary: Entry contains the pay page.
narrative.taskDescription: Model the pay page as a direct child of the system entry diagram.

narrative.summary: Entry contains the order-detail page.
narrative.taskDescription: Model the order-detail page as a direct child of the system entry diagram.

narrative.summary: Entry contains the admin page.
narrative.taskDescription: Model the admin page as a direct child of the system entry diagram.

narrative.summary: Entry routes guests to login.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate from the system entry state to the login page entry state through the public login portal.

validations.description: 進入平台後必須導向 /login，Guest 只能看到登入頁，受保護頁與受保護 API 仍需維持導向 /login 或回 401。

narrative.summary: Login page shows the credential form.
narrative.taskDescription: Render the login form with email, password, and a single login CTA.

validations.description: LoginPage.Ready 必須顯示 email、password 與登入按鈕，且同頁不可重複出現第二個登入 CTA。

narrative.summary: Authenticated visitors bypass the login form.
narrative.taskDescription: Keep the active session and transition into the already-authenticated state instead of showing the form again.

validations.description: 已登入者造訪 /login 時不得再次顯示登入表單，系統需保留有效 session 並準備導向 /orders。

narrative.summary: Refreshing login reinitializes the page.
narrative.taskDescription: Reset the login page state while preserving the guest-only visibility rules for protected navigation.

validations.description: 重新整理 /login 後表單需重新初始化但不遺失公開可見性規則，Guest 仍只看得到登入入口。

narrative.summary: Submitting credentials invokes login authentication.
narrative.taskDescription: Send the user from the login page ready state into the authentication feature to process credentials.

validations.description: 送出登入後按鈕需 disabled 並顯示 Loading，登入 API 成功需建立 HttpOnly session cookie，失敗不得洩漏帳號是否存在。

narrative.summary: Authenticated visitors redirect to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Route already-authenticated users from the login page to the orders page entry state without showing the login form.

validations.description: 已登入者必須直接導向 /orders，Admin 後續仍可從導覽進入 /admin，且不應短暫停留在登入表單。

narrative.summary: Orders page starts loading data.
narrative.taskDescription: Request the orders list and show the loading state without leaking stale rows from a previous page.

validations.description: 載入列表時需顯示 Loading，並發送列表查詢；User 與 Admin 都不可看到前一頁殘留資料。

narrative.summary: Orders page finishes loading with data.
narrative.taskDescription: Populate the list with data that matches the current role visibility and filter conditions.

validations.description: 列表成功時每頁最多 20 筆，且資料需符合目前角色可見範圍與篩選條件。

narrative.summary: Orders page resolves to an empty state.
narrative.taskDescription: Show the empty state with a create-order entry and without mixing in stale data or error messaging.

validations.description: 無資料時必須顯示 Empty 狀態與建立訂單入口，不得同時顯示錯誤訊息或舊列表資料。

narrative.summary: Orders page handles a loading failure.
narrative.taskDescription: Show an error state with retry support and suppress stack traces or sensitive details.

validations.description: 載入失敗時需顯示 Error 與可重試操作，畫面不得洩漏例外堆疊或敏感資訊。

narrative.summary: Orders page retries after an error.
narrative.taskDescription: Restart the orders page loading flow and clear the previous error message once the retry succeeds.

validations.description: 重試後需重新發送列表查詢並回到 Init/Loading 流程，成功時不得殘留先前錯誤提示。

narrative.summary: Orders base contains the user-developer delta.
narrative.taskDescription: Attach the user-developer orders delta diagram under the shared orders page base behavior.

narrative.summary: Orders base contains the admin delta.
narrative.taskDescription: Attach the admin orders delta diagram under the shared orders page base behavior.

narrative.summary: Orders base switches into the user-developer view.
narrative.taskDescription: Apply the user-developer delta after the shared orders page reaches the ready state.

validations.description: User（Developer）視角下列表資料必須只包含自己建立的訂單，Header 顯示 /orders、/orders/new、登出，且不顯示 /admin。

narrative.summary: Orders base switches into the admin view.
narrative.taskDescription: Apply the admin delta after the shared orders page reaches the ready state.

validations.description: Admin 視角下列表必須可查看全站訂單，並保留 /admin 導覽與篩選建立者、狀態、付款方式、情境、時間區間的能力。

narrative.summary: Orders page opens the create-order page.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate from the ready orders list into the create-order page.

validations.description: 點擊建立訂單必須導向 /orders/new，且同頁不可重複出現多個語意相同的建立訂單入口。

narrative.summary: Orders page opens order detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate from the orders list into a specific order detail page using the selected order id.

validations.description: 開啟詳情時必須帶入正確訂單 id，User（Developer）若請求他人訂單後端必須回 403。

narrative.summary: Orders page logs out to login.
narrative.taskDescription: Invalidate the session and navigate back to the login page from the ready orders state.

validations.description: 登出後 session 必須失效並清除 cookie，AuditLog 要記錄 logout，重新進 /orders 應再次被導向 /login。

narrative.summary: Empty orders page opens create-order.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate from the empty orders state into the create-order page to create the first simulated order.

validations.description: Empty 狀態下建立第一筆訂單仍須導向 /orders/new，且不應額外產生重複 CTA。

narrative.summary: Create-order page shows the form.
narrative.taskDescription: Render all create-order inputs and the fixed return method information for the new order flow.

validations.description: 表單需顯示 amount、currency、callback_url、webhook_url、payment_method、simulation_scenario、delay_sec、webhook_delay_sec、error_code、error_message，且 return_method 為系統預設值並清楚顯示不可編輯。

narrative.summary: Refreshing create-order resets defaults.
narrative.taskDescription: Reload the create-order defaults so return method and enabled payment method choices reflect the latest system settings.

validations.description: 重新整理建立頁後欄位需重新載入預設值，return_method 預設與可用付款方式清單需保持最新系統設定。

narrative.summary: Create-order page submits into the order creation feature.
narrative.taskDescription: Send the completed create-order form into the create-order feature for validation and persistence.

validations.description: 送出時需防重送並顯示 Loading，payment_method 只能選 enabled 的付款方式，currency 必須落在允許幣別清單。

narrative.summary: Create-order page cancels back to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate back to the orders page without persisting a new order or emitting successful create-order audit records.

validations.description: 取消建立後必須回到 /orders，尚未建立資料前不得寫入 Order、OrderStateEvent、AuditLog 建單成功事件。

narrative.summary: Pay page loads the target order.
narrative.taskDescription: Load the payment page data, expose the order summary, and only on first successful load advance the order from created to payment_pending.

validations.description: 付款頁成功載入時需顯示 order_no、amount、currency、payment_method、simulation_scenario、delay_sec 以及適用的 error_code、error_message，且首次成功載入須把訂單從 created 推進到 payment_pending。

narrative.summary: Pay page handles a missing order.
narrative.taskDescription: Render a 404 state and avoid writing any payment, return, or webhook records for an unknown order number.

validations.description: order_no 不存在時必須顯示 404，且不得寫入 OrderStateEvent、ReturnLog、WebhookLog。

narrative.summary: Pay page blocks unauthorized access.
narrative.taskDescription: Render a 403 state and suppress sensitive order data when a user opens another creator's order.

validations.description: User（Developer）存取他人訂單時必須顯示 403，並且不得洩漏該訂單的 amount、callback_url、webhook_url 等資料。

narrative.summary: Pay page handles a load failure.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retryable error state without accidentally advancing the order into payment_pending.

validations.description: 載入失敗時需顯示可重試錯誤，不得誤把訂單推進到 payment_pending。

narrative.summary: Pay page retries loading the order.
narrative.taskDescription: Reload the same payment page route and clear the previous error if the next fetch succeeds.

validations.description: 重試付款頁必須重新查詢同一筆 order_no，若成功載入才可進入 Ready，錯誤提示需被正確清除。

narrative.summary: Pay page starts payment simulation.
narrative.taskDescription: Invoke the payment simulation feature from the loaded pay page state to resolve the chosen scenario.

validations.description: 觸發付款後按鈕需 disabled，Processing/倒數 UI 要依 delay_sec 顯示，且終態只能由模擬情境決定為 paid、failed、cancelled、timeout 其中之一。

narrative.summary: Pay page returns to order detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate back to the same order detail page without creating an extra state transition on the order itself.

validations.description: 返回訂單詳情時需回到同一筆訂單，詳情頁必須能看到目前狀態與既有紀錄，不得產生額外狀態轉換。

narrative.summary: Missing pay page returns to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate back to the orders list from the pay page 404 state without carrying stale order data.

validations.description: 從 404 返回列表後列表需正常載入，且不可殘留不存在訂單的頁面資料。

narrative.summary: Forbidden pay page returns to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate back to the orders list from the pay page 403 state while preserving role-based visibility.

validations.description: 從 403 返回列表後仍需維持原角色的可見範圍，User（Developer）不可因返回而看到他人訂單。

narrative.summary: Order detail page begins loading records.
narrative.taskDescription: Fetch the order, return logs, webhook logs, state events, replay runs, and audit logs without leaking stale data from another order.

validations.description: 載入詳情時需查詢訂單本體、ReturnLog、WebhookLog、OrderStateEvent、ReplayRun、AuditLog，且畫面不可殘留上一筆訂單內容。

narrative.summary: Order detail page loads successfully.
narrative.taskDescription: Show the order status, completion time, and all associated immutable records for the selected order.

validations.description: 詳情載入成功時需顯示 status、completed_at 與所有對應紀錄，並保持資料與目前訂單一致。

narrative.summary: Order detail page handles a missing order.
narrative.taskDescription: Render a 404 state and ensure no residue from a previous order remains on screen.

validations.description: 訂單不存在時必須顯示 404，不得顯示任何前一筆訂單殘留的紀錄。

narrative.summary: Order detail page blocks unauthorized access.
narrative.taskDescription: Render a 403 state and prevent return, webhook, replay, or audit data from leaking across creators.

validations.description: User（Developer）存取他人訂單時必須顯示 403，且 ReturnLog、WebhookLog、ReplayRun、AuditLog 都不可外洩。

narrative.summary: Order detail page handles a load failure.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a retryable error state while leaving the order state and all immutable logs untouched.

validations.description: 詳情載入失敗時需顯示可重試錯誤，且不得更動訂單狀態或任何不可變紀錄。

narrative.summary: Order detail page retries loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Reload the same order detail route and clear the previous error once the fetch succeeds.

validations.description: 重試詳情時必須重新讀取同一筆訂單與其紀錄，成功後 Error 提示需清除且資料完整。

narrative.summary: Order detail base contains the user-developer delta.
narrative.taskDescription: Attach the user-developer order detail delta diagram under the shared order detail behavior.

narrative.summary: Order detail base contains the admin delta.
narrative.taskDescription: Attach the admin order detail delta diagram under the shared order detail behavior.

narrative.summary: Order detail base switches into the user-developer view.
narrative.taskDescription: Apply the user-developer delta after the shared order detail page has loaded.

validations.description: User（Developer）視角下僅能操作自己訂單的 replay 與 webhook resend，且不應出現管理後台入口。

narrative.summary: Order detail base switches into the admin view.
narrative.taskDescription: Apply the admin delta after the shared order detail page has loaded.

validations.description: Admin 視角下可查看任意訂單的完整紀錄並保留 /admin 導覽，仍不得出現刪除不可變紀錄的操作。

narrative.summary: Order detail opens the pay page.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate from the order detail page into the matching payment page for the same order number.

validations.description: 開啟付款頁時必須導向同一筆訂單的 /pay/:order_no，若訂單尚未首次載入付款頁才可觸發 created→payment_pending。

narrative.summary: Order detail returns to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate back to the orders list while keeping list visibility and displayed statuses aligned with the current role.

validations.description: 返回列表後應維持原角色的篩選與可見範圍，且列表資料需與詳情中訂單狀態一致。

narrative.summary: Order detail logs out to login.
narrative.taskDescription: Invalidate the session from the order detail page and return to the login route.

validations.description: 從詳情頁登出後 session 必須失效，重新整理詳情頁時需被導向 /login，AuditLog 記錄 logout。

narrative.summary: Missing order detail returns to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate from the order-detail 404 state back to the orders list without leaving behind the invalid order id.

validations.description: 從 404 返回後列表需正常顯示，不得保留不存在訂單的 id 或內容。

narrative.summary: Forbidden order detail returns to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate back to the orders list from the 403 state while maintaining the current user's permitted data scope.

validations.description: 從 403 返回列表後 User（Developer）仍僅可看到自己的訂單，權限不足訊息不可殘留到其他訂單頁。

narrative.summary: Admin page loads the management console.
narrative.taskDescription: Load the admin console with payment methods, scenario templates, and global order and audit query capabilities.

validations.description: 後台成功載入時需顯示 PaymentMethod、SimulationScenarioTemplate 與全站訂單/操作紀錄查詢能力。

narrative.summary: Admin page blocks non-admin users.
narrative.taskDescription: Render a 403 state without exposing admin forms, key rotation settings, or global data to non-admin users.

validations.description: 非 Admin 進入後台時必須顯示 403，且不得渲染任何管理表單、密鑰策略或全站資料。

narrative.summary: Admin page handles a load failure.
narrative.taskDescription: Render a retryable admin error state without partially applying any management changes.

validations.description: 後台載入失敗時需顯示可重試錯誤，不得產生管理資料修改或部分畫面更新。

narrative.summary: Admin page retries loading.
narrative.taskDescription: Reload the admin route and clear the previous error state once the management console loads successfully.

validations.description: 重試後台載入需重新查詢管理資料，成功後不得殘留前一次錯誤訊息。

narrative.summary: Admin page opens payment-method management.
narrative.taskDescription: Invoke the payment-method management feature from the ready admin console.

validations.description: 進入付款方式管理時只能由 Admin 操作，後續變更需影響建立訂單頁可選的 enabled 付款方式與排序。

narrative.summary: Admin page opens scenario-template management.
narrative.taskDescription: Invoke the scenario-template management feature from the ready admin console.

validations.description: 進入情境模板管理時需可維護 default_delay_sec、default_error_code、default_error_message、enabled，且只限 Admin。

narrative.summary: Admin page inspects order detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Open any order detail from the admin console while preserving admin visibility across all logs.

validations.description: 從後台查看任一訂單詳情時應保留 Admin 權限，可看見全量 ReturnLog、WebhookLog、ReplayRun、AuditLog。

narrative.summary: Admin page returns to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate back to the all-orders list while retaining admin scope and admin navigation.

validations.description: 返回 /orders 後需進入 Admin 可見的全站列表，不得退化成 User（Developer）資料範圍。

narrative.summary: Admin page logs out to login.
narrative.taskDescription: End the admin session and navigate back to the login page so the admin route is protected again.

validations.description: 後台登出後 session 必須失效，再次進 /admin 應被攔截，AuditLog 需寫入 logout 成功事件。

narrative.summary: Forbidden admin page returns to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate back to the orders list from the admin-page 403 state with only the current role's visible navigation.

validations.description: 非 Admin 從 403 返回列表後只能看到其角色允許的列表內容，管理導覽不可留在 Header。

narrative.summary: User-developer orders delta filters to own orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Restrict the orders view to only the current creator's orders and keep filtering inside that owned dataset.

validations.description: ReadyOwnOrders 中每筆訂單的 user_id 都必須等於目前登入者，避免 IDOR，且篩選結果只在自己的訂單集合內生效。

narrative.summary: User-developer orders delta opens own order detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate from the user-developer orders view to the selected owned order detail page.

validations.description: 開啟自己的訂單詳情時應成功進入 /orders/:id；若以他人 id 替換網址，後端必須回 403。

narrative.summary: User-developer orders delta opens create-order.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate from the owned-orders view into the create-order page without duplicating the CTA.

validations.description: User（Developer）可從自己的列表進入建立訂單頁，且頁面內不應再出現第二個重複的建立訂單入口。

narrative.summary: User-developer orders delta logs out to login.
narrative.taskDescription: Clear the session from the owned-orders view and route the user back to the login page.

validations.description: 從 User（Developer）列表登出後需清除 session 並回到 /login，之後請求列表 API 必須回 401。

narrative.summary: Admin orders delta expands to all orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Show the global orders dataset with filters for creator, status, payment method, scenario, and time range.

validations.description: ReadyAllOrders 需支援全站訂單查詢與依建立者、狀態、付款方式、情境、時間區間篩選，且每頁最多 20 筆。

narrative.summary: Admin orders delta opens any order detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate from the admin orders list to any selected order detail without creator-based restrictions.

validations.description: Admin 開啟任一訂單時不可受 user_id 限制，詳情頁需顯示完整紀錄。

narrative.summary: Admin orders delta opens create-order.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate from the admin orders list into the create-order page and preserve the current admin creator identity.

validations.description: Admin 可建立訂單，建立者必須記錄為目前 Admin user_id，並寫入 AuditLog 的 create_order 成功事件。

narrative.summary: Admin orders delta opens the admin console.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate from the all-orders admin view into the admin console while preserving admin authorization.

validations.description: 從列表進入 /admin 必須保持 Admin 權限與後台導覽一致，不得出現 403。

narrative.summary: Admin orders delta logs out to login.
narrative.taskDescription: End the admin session from the admin orders view and return to the login page.

validations.description: 從 Admin 列表登出後再進 /orders 或 /admin 都需重新驗證，AuditLog 要記錄 logout。

narrative.summary: User-developer order detail delta shows owned records.
narrative.taskDescription: Expose the selected owned order's status, completion time, and related immutable logs without leaking any other user's records.

validations.description: ReadyOwnOrder 需顯示該訂單的狀態、completed_at、ReturnLog、WebhookLog、OrderStateEvent、ReplayRun、AuditLog，且不得顯示他人資料。

narrative.summary: User-developer order detail triggers webhook resend.
narrative.taskDescription: Invoke webhook resend only when the order is terminal, has a webhook URL, and the current user owns the order.

validations.description: 僅當 webhook_url 有值且訂單已進入終態時才可重送，操作後需新增 WebhookLog 與 AuditLog(action=resend_webhook)。

narrative.summary: User-developer order detail triggers replay.
narrative.taskDescription: Invoke replay while preserving the original terminal state and creating a ReplayRun with an explicit scope.

validations.description: Replay 必須可選 webhook_only 或 full_flow，建立 ReplayRun 後不得改變原訂單終態。

narrative.summary: User-developer order detail reopens pay page.
narrative.taskDescription: Reopen the same order's pay page without illegally changing a terminal order back to a non-terminal state.

validations.description: 重新開啟付款頁時需對應同一筆 order_no，若訂單已是終態，頁面只能反映既有結果，不得非法轉回非終態。

narrative.summary: User-developer order detail returns to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate back to the user-developer orders flow while preserving owned-order visibility and data consistency.

validations.description: 返回列表後仍應維持 User（Developer）自己的訂單範圍與目前資料一致性。

narrative.summary: Admin order detail delta shows managed records.
narrative.taskDescription: Expose the selected order's full immutable records to an admin without surfacing any delete action.

validations.description: ReadyManagedOrder 必須可查看任意訂單的完整 ReturnLog、WebhookLog、OrderStateEvent、ReplayRun、AuditLog，且無刪除入口。

narrative.summary: Admin order detail triggers webhook resend.
narrative.taskDescription: Invoke webhook resend while keeping business payload fields identical and regenerating timestamp and signature.

validations.description: Admin 重送 webhook 時仍需沿用同一筆訂單 payload 業務欄位，但 timestamp 與 signature 必須重新產生。

narrative.summary: Admin order detail triggers replay.
narrative.taskDescription: Invoke replay while preserving the original terminal state and linking new return and webhook logs to replay_run_id.

validations.description: Admin 執行 Replay 也不得改變原始終態，ReplayRun、ReturnLog、WebhookLog 需以 replay_run_id 關聯。

narrative.summary: Admin order detail opens pay page.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate from the managed order detail into the pay page while still enforcing legal state transitions only.

validations.description: Admin 可開啟任意訂單的付款頁，但狀態機仍只允許合法轉換，非法轉換必須回 400 且不得寫入 OrderStateEvent。

narrative.summary: Admin order detail returns to admin console.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate from the managed order detail back to the admin console without losing admin navigation scope.

validations.description: 返回後台後需保留 Admin 管理視角與導覽，不得遺失後台權限。

narrative.summary: Admin order detail returns to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate back to the admin orders flow so the admin can continue inspecting other orders.

validations.description: 返回列表後仍應是 Admin 全站列表視角，可繼續查看其他訂單。

narrative.summary: Login feature submits credentials.
narrative.taskDescription: Send email and password, show loading, and block duplicate submissions while authentication is in progress.

validations.description: 送出登入請求時需帶 email 與 password，UI 顯示 Loading 並鎖定重複送出。

narrative.summary: Login feature authenticates a user-developer.
narrative.taskDescription: Establish a valid HttpOnly session cookie, update last_login_at, and record a successful login audit event for a user-developer account.

validations.description: 驗證成功且角色為 User（Developer）時需建立 HttpOnly session cookie、更新 last_login_at、寫入 AuditLog(action=login, success=true)。

narrative.summary: Login feature authenticates an admin.
narrative.taskDescription: Establish a valid HttpOnly session cookie, update last_login_at, and record a successful login audit event for an admin account.

validations.description: 驗證成功且角色為 Admin 時需建立 HttpOnly session cookie、更新 last_login_at、寫入 AuditLog(action=login, success=true)，後續 Header 要包含 /admin。

narrative.summary: Login feature rejects invalid credentials.
narrative.taskDescription: Show a recognizable failure message without revealing whether the account exists, avoid creating a session, and record a failed login audit event.

validations.description: 登入失敗時需顯示可辨識錯誤訊息但不可洩漏帳號是否存在，且不得建立 session cookie，AuditLog(action=login, success=false) 必須寫入。

narrative.summary: Failed login returns to login page.
narrative.taskDescription: Return from the failed authentication state to the login page so the user can retry with the prior failure context visible.

validations.description: 返回登入頁後需保留可再次輸入帳密的狀態，錯誤訊息應與前次失敗結果一致。

narrative.summary: Authenticated user-developer goes to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Route a successfully authenticated user-developer into the orders page with only owned orders visible and no admin navigation.

validations.description: User（Developer）登入完成後必須導向 /orders，列表資料只允許自己的訂單，Header 不得顯示 /admin。

narrative.summary: Authenticated admin goes to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Route a successfully authenticated admin into the orders page with global visibility and admin navigation available.

validations.description: Admin 登入完成後必須導向 /orders 並可從導覽進 /admin，列表查詢需具備全站可見性。

narrative.summary: Cancelling login returns to login page.
narrative.taskDescription: Leave the authentication feature without creating a session or recording a successful authentication event.

validations.description: 取消登入後不得建立任何 session 或 AuditLog 成功事件，畫面需回到登入頁可輸入狀態。

narrative.summary: Create-order feature validates input.
narrative.taskDescription: Validate amount, currency, URLs, and delay fields before attempting to persist a new order.

validations.description: 驗證時需檢查 amount 為正整數、currency 在允許清單、callback_url/webhook_url 為 http/https、delay_sec 與 webhook_delay_sec 不小於 0。

narrative.summary: Create-order feature persists a new order.
narrative.taskDescription: Create a unique order in created status with the fixed return method and record a successful create-order audit event.

validations.description: 建立成功時 Order 必須寫入唯一 order_no、status=created、return_method 固定、created_at/updated_at 正確，並寫入 AuditLog(action=create_order, success=true)。

narrative.summary: Create-order feature rejects invalid input.
narrative.taskDescription: Return field-level validation failures with HTTP 400 and avoid creating any order or partial event records.

validations.description: 驗證失敗時 API 必須回 400 並逐項回傳欄位錯誤，且不得建立 Order、OrderStateEvent 或半成品紀錄。

narrative.summary: Create-order feature handles server persistence failure.
narrative.taskDescription: Return a server error while ensuring no partial order data is committed and the UI remains retryable.

validations.description: 伺服器失敗時需回 500 並保證資料未部分寫入，畫面保留可重試狀態。

narrative.summary: Validation failure returns to create-order page.
narrative.taskDescription: Return to the create-order page with field-level errors so the user can fix and resubmit.

validations.description: 返回建立頁後原錯誤欄位需清楚顯示，使用者可修正後再次送出。

narrative.summary: Persistence failure returns to create-order page.
narrative.taskDescription: Return to the create-order page with a retryable server error and no duplicated order creation.

validations.description: 返回建立頁後需顯示一般伺服器錯誤且不得重複建立同一筆訂單。

narrative.summary: Created order opens pay page.
narrative.taskDescription: Navigate to the generated pay page while keeping the new order in created status until the pay page first loads successfully.

validations.description: 建立成功後必須能開啟對應 /pay/:order_no，且該訂單尚處於 created，尚未因建立動作直接進入終態。

narrative.summary: Cancelling order creation returns to orders.
narrative.taskDescription: Leave the create-order feature without persisting any order data and return to the orders list unchanged.

validations.description: 取消建立後不應留下任何新訂單資料，返回列表時資料筆數與狀態需維持原樣。

narrative.summary: Payment simulation marks the order as payment pending.
narrative.taskDescription: Advance the order from created to payment_pending exactly once when the pay page first loads successfully.

validations.description: 首次成功載入付款頁後需把狀態從 created 推進到 payment_pending，寫入 OrderStateEvent(trigger=enter_payment_page, from=created, to=payment_pending)，重複進頁不得重複寫入。

narrative.summary: Payment simulation enters delay countdown.
narrative.taskDescription: Keep the order in payment_pending while showing the configured delay countdown before resolving the scenario.

validations.description: 當情境需要延遲時 UI 必須顯示 delay_sec 倒數，訂單在倒數期間維持 payment_pending，不得提前寫入 completed_at。

narrative.summary: Payment simulation resolves an immediate scenario.
narrative.taskDescription: Resolve an immediate success, failure, cancellation, or timeout into a terminal order state and record completion time.

validations.description: 無延遲或立即結束情境時需直接進入終態，狀態只能是 paid、failed、cancelled、timeout 之一，completed_at 必須寫入。

narrative.summary: Payment simulation resolves a delayed scenario.
narrative.taskDescription: Resolve the delayed scenario into the correct terminal state and write the corresponding state event and error payload fields when applicable.

validations.description: 延遲結束後必須依情境轉為正確終態；failed 或 timeout 時 error_code、error_message 需與模板/覆寫值一致，並寫入 OrderStateEvent(trigger=pay 或 complete_timeout)。

narrative.summary: Resolved payment dispatches the return payload.
narrative.taskDescription: Hand off the terminal payment outcome to the return-dispatch feature with the full terminal payload prepared.

validations.description: 終態確定後需準備 Return payload，欄位至少包含 order_no、status、amount、currency、completed_at，以及適用的 error_code、error_message。

narrative.summary: Return dispatch prepares the callback payload.
narrative.taskDescription: Choose query_string or post_form from the stored order return method and prepare a payload consistent with webhook fields.

validations.description: 準備回傳時需依訂單固定的 return_method 決定 query_string 或 post_form，不得在建立訂單後變更 return_method。

narrative.summary: Return dispatch succeeds.
narrative.taskDescription: Send the callback payload by the configured method and persist a successful ReturnLog with callback URL, payload, dispatch time, and delivery method.

validations.description: 成功回傳時需依 query_string 或 post_form 送出 callback_url，並寫入 ReturnLog(delivery_method、callback_url、payload、dispatched_at、success=true)。

narrative.summary: Return dispatch records a failure.
narrative.taskDescription: Persist a failed ReturnLog with payload, callback URL, and error details even when the browser-side callback dispatch fails.

validations.description: 瀏覽器端回傳失敗時仍須寫入 ReturnLog(success=false, error_message)，且 payload 與目標 callback_url 必須被完整記錄。

narrative.summary: Successful return schedules webhook dispatch.
narrative.taskDescription: Schedule webhook dispatch after a successful callback when the order has a webhook URL, without blocking the primary response.

validations.description: 若 webhook_url 有值，Return 成功後需依 webhook_delay_sec 或 delay_sec 排程非同步 Webhook，不得阻塞主要回應。

narrative.summary: Successful return goes back to order detail without webhook.
narrative.taskDescription: Return directly to order detail when no webhook URL is configured so the new ReturnLog is visible without creating a WebhookLog.

validations.description: 若未設定 webhook_url，返回詳情頁時需可看見剛建立的 ReturnLog，且不得產生 WebhookLog。

narrative.summary: Failed return still schedules webhook dispatch.
narrative.taskDescription: Continue into webhook dispatch after a failed callback whenever the order still has a webhook URL configured.

validations.description: 即使 Return 失敗，只要 webhook_url 有值仍需依規則排程 Webhook，ReturnLog 與後續 WebhookLog 必須可同時存在。

narrative.summary: Failed return goes back to order detail without webhook.
narrative.taskDescription: Return directly to order detail after a failed callback when no webhook URL exists, preserving the terminal order state.

validations.description: 若無 webhook_url 且 Return 失敗，詳情頁必須顯示 ReturnLog 失敗結果與 error_message，原訂單終態不得被改動。

narrative.summary: Webhook dispatch enqueues delivery.
narrative.taskDescription: Create the asynchronous webhook delivery work item with delay, timestamp, and HMAC signature prepared.

validations.description: 有 webhook_url 時需建立非同步發送工作，使用 webhook_delay_sec 或 delay_sec 決定延遲，並準備 timestamp 與 HMAC signature。

narrative.summary: Webhook dispatch succeeds.
narrative.taskDescription: Send the webhook successfully and persist a WebhookLog with request metadata, payload, response summary, and success status.

validations.description: 發送成功時需寫入 WebhookLog(request_url、request_headers、payload、sent_at、response_status、response_body_excerpt、success=true)，Header 必須含 timestamp、signature。

narrative.summary: Webhook dispatch fails.
narrative.taskDescription: Persist a failed WebhookLog with payload, response summary, and enough data to support later resend and debugging.

validations.description: 發送失敗時需寫入 WebhookLog(success=false) 與回應摘要，且 payload 仍需完整保存，方便後續重送與除錯。

narrative.summary: Webhook dispatch skips when webhook is not configured.
narrative.taskDescription: Bypass webhook delivery cleanly when the order has no webhook URL and avoid creating any WebhookLog.

validations.description: 若 webhook_url 為空則不得建立任何 WebhookLog，並應明確標示此次流程略過 webhook。

narrative.summary: Successful webhook returns to order detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Go back to order detail after webhook delivery so the new WebhookLog, timestamp, and signature are visible.

validations.description: 返回詳情頁後需看見新增的 WebhookLog 與對應 timestamp、signature，訂單終態保持不變。

narrative.summary: Failed webhook returns to order detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Go back to order detail after webhook failure so the failed WebhookLog and resend entry point are visible.

validations.description: 返回詳情頁後需能檢視失敗的 WebhookLog、response_status、response_body_excerpt，並保留後續重送入口。

narrative.summary: Skipped webhook returns to order detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Return to order detail after explicitly skipping webhook delivery so only return and state-transition records remain visible.

validations.description: 略過 webhook 後詳情頁不應出現新的 WebhookLog，但仍需保留 Return 與狀態轉換紀錄。

narrative.summary: Webhook resend prepares a regenerated request.
narrative.taskDescription: Reuse the business payload, regenerate timestamp and signature, and record the resend webhook audit event before dispatch.

validations.description: 重送前需沿用相同業務 payload，重新產生 timestamp 與 signature，並寫入 AuditLog(action=resend_webhook)。

narrative.summary: Webhook resend hands off to webhook dispatch.
narrative.taskDescription: Send the prepared resend request through the webhook-dispatch feature while preserving the original business payload fields.

validations.description: 交由 WebhookDispatch 發送時，新 WebhookLog 的 payload 業務欄位需與原紀錄一致，但 request_headers 中的 timestamp、signature 必須不同。

narrative.summary: Webhook resend can cancel back to order detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Leave webhook resend without creating a new WebhookLog or successful resend audit event.

validations.description: 取消重送後不得新增 WebhookLog 或 AuditLog 成功事件，詳情頁維持原有紀錄。

narrative.summary: Replay feature selects a replay scope.
narrative.taskDescription: Choose webhook_only or full_flow explicitly and create a ReplayRun bound to the current order and initiating user.

validations.description: 使用者必須明確選擇 webhook_only 或 full_flow，系統需建立 ReplayRun(started_at、initiated_by_user_id、scope)。

narrative.summary: Replay webhook-only hands off to webhook dispatch.
narrative.taskDescription: Run a webhook-only replay through webhook dispatch and associate the resulting WebhookLog with replay_run_id without creating a ReturnLog.

validations.description: 選擇 webhook_only 時只能重送 Webhook，新的 WebhookLog 必須帶 replay_run_id，且不得新增 ReturnLog。

narrative.summary: Replay full-flow hands off to return dispatch.
narrative.taskDescription: Run a full-flow replay through return dispatch so new return and optional webhook logs are both linked to replay_run_id.

validations.description: 選擇 full_flow 時需重跑 Return，並在有 webhook_url 時接續重跑 Webhook；新的 ReturnLog 與 WebhookLog 必須帶 replay_run_id。

narrative.summary: Replay can cancel back to order detail.
narrative.taskDescription: Leave replay without creating a ReplayRun, ReturnLog, or WebhookLog and return to the unchanged order detail page.

validations.description: 取消 Replay 後不得新增 ReplayRun、ReturnLog、WebhookLog，原詳情資料保持不變。

narrative.summary: Payment-method management enters editing.
narrative.taskDescription: Open the payment-method editor with code, display name, enabled, and sort-order fields visible to admin only.

validations.description: 編輯狀態需顯示 code、display_name、enabled、sort_order 等欄位，且不可刪除既有不可逆紀錄。

narrative.summary: Payment-method management saves changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Persist the updated display name, enabled state, and sort order and record a successful admin_manage_payment_method audit event.

validations.description: 儲存成功後需更新 PaymentMethod 的 display_name、enabled、sort_order，並寫入 AuditLog(action=admin_manage_payment_method, success=true)。

narrative.summary: Payment-method management rejects invalid changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject the attempted changes without partial updates and keep enough error context for retry and failed-audit tracking.

validations.description: 儲存失敗時需保留錯誤訊息與原始資料一致性，不得產生部分更新，AuditLog 應記錄失敗嘗試。

narrative.summary: Saved payment-method changes return to admin page.
narrative.taskDescription: Return to the admin page and immediately reflect the enabled payment-method configuration in downstream create-order selection.

validations.description: 返回後台後清單需立即反映新的付款方式設定，建立訂單頁只能看到 enabled=true 的項目。

narrative.summary: Failed payment-method changes return to admin page.
narrative.taskDescription: Return to the admin page with failure feedback while keeping the prior valid payment-method values intact.

validations.description: 返回後台時需顯示管理失敗結果，PaymentMethod 資料仍保持先前有效值。

narrative.summary: Scenario-template management enters editing.
narrative.taskDescription: Open the scenario-template editor with type, default delay, default error code, default error message, and enabled fields available to admin only.

validations.description: 編輯狀態需可調整 type、default_delay_sec、default_error_code、default_error_message、enabled，且欄位值需符合模板定義。

narrative.summary: Scenario-template management saves changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Persist the updated template defaults and record a successful admin_manage_scenario_template audit event.

validations.description: 儲存成功後模板預設值需更新，建立訂單頁套用對應情境時應帶入新的預設 delay 與錯誤資訊，AuditLog(action=admin_manage_scenario_template, success=true) 必須寫入。

narrative.summary: Scenario-template management rejects invalid changes.
narrative.taskDescription: Reject the attempted template update without partial writes and keep error feedback available for retry and audit history.

validations.description: 儲存失敗時不得產生部分更新，錯誤需可重試，AuditLog 應保留失敗結果與錯誤資訊。

narrative.summary: Saved scenario-template changes return to admin page.
narrative.taskDescription: Return to the admin page and immediately surface the updated scenario defaults for later order creation.

validations.description: 返回後台後情境模板清單需立即顯示最新預設值，後續建立訂單流程應讀到更新後資料。

narrative.summary: Failed scenario-template changes return to admin page.
narrative.taskDescription: Return to the admin page with failure feedback while preserving the previous valid scenario-template values.

validations.description: 返回後台時需顯示失敗結果且維持舊模板資料，系統不可讀到未完成的模板更新。
